n: Chapter 11.6: Tales of the Bright Company

steps.t: Magoldir desires to scout a location to the east of Adambel for Glorfindel of the Bright Company.
Magoldir wishes to report to Glorfindel of the Bright Company at the encampment of Echad-in-Edhil, north-west of Adambel in Mordor Besieged.
Glorfindel, leader of the Bright Company, is waiting to speak with you in the Elf-camp of Echad-in-Edhil.
